message:
feat(FJ-P2C-008-F): differential oracle + metamorphic + adversarial for LAX primitives

50 conformance tests in lax_oracle.rs:
- 25 oracle tests: arithmetic (add/sub/mul/neg/abs/max/min/pow),
  transcendental (exp/log/sqrt/rsqrt/sin/cos/floor/ceil/round),
  comparison (eq/ne/lt/le/gt/ge + NaN behavior), reductions (sum/max/min/prod),
  shape ops (reshape/transpose/broadcast/concatenate/slice), dot product
- 8 metamorphic: add/mul identity, neg involution, exp-log inverse,
  transpose involution, reduce_sum manual, abs idempotent, max-min agree
- 12 adversarial: incompatible reshape, shape mismatch broadcast/dot,
  arity violations, unsupported primitives, inverted slice, 10K element
  reduction, empty concatenate, double inferred dims

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
